title: pritzelago alpina subsp. auerswaldii
intro: Pritzelago alpina subsp. auerswaldii, also known as the Alpine Wintercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pritzelago alpina subsp. auerswaldii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
